scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build && npm run smoke:package && npm run docs:evaluate && npm run playground:typecheck && npm run playground:test && npm run playground:build && npm run site:evaluate && npm run site:verify:pages
scripts.playground:typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @zod-crud/api-collection && npm run typecheck -w @zod-crud/outliner && npm run typecheck -w @zod-crud/mobile-cms && npm run typecheck -w @zod-crud/site
scripts.playground:test: npm test -w @zod-crud/site && npm test -w @zod-crud/api-collection && npm test -w @zod-crud/outliner && npm test -w @zod-crud/mobile-cms
scripts.site:verify:pages: npm run site:build:pages && npm run site:evaluate:pages
